attributes.action: Enquiry into drop off and pick up fees at UK airports
attributes.additional_details: Airports are free to charge whichever fee they wish. There are not any standards to prevent them from increasing the charge year on year or whenever they wish.
attributes.background: Parliament should cap the fees that airports are permitted to charge.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Launch a review into airport terminal drop-off charges
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759700

Cap airport drop-off and pick-up fees at £5 across UK airports
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764312

Ban all public airports from charging drop-off and pick-up fees
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756767
